---
title: Debugging 
author: Osman Alsheghri 
---

## constatants 
$$ K_4 = 42264029677.73118 $$
This is reasonable with the units of $mol/m^3$

$$ K_{aw} = 1.2260979713047753 $$
Should be around 0.8 - 1.2 so correct

$$kg = 0.7041892203200024 $$
This is too high according to Feilbergs excel file


$$ Kga = array([0.00173952, 0.00173952, 0.00173952, 0.00173952, 0.00173952,0.00173952, 0.00173952, 0.00173952, 0.00173952, 0.00173952])$$
Thi might be too low? becasue in the Thesis he gets arount 0.3


### in the Kga
$$  1 / (kg * ae)  = 0.005463565577929149 $$

$$ Daw / (kl * ae * E) = array([38.35761085, 38.35761085, 38.35761085, 38.35761085, 38.35761085, 38.35761085, 38.35761085, 38.35761085, 38.35761085, 38.35761085]) $$

$$ Daw / (k1 * por_l) = np.float64(536.5093818546206) $$

Why is the third one so high compared to the other two? is it reasonable? 
It makes sense that the resistence is greates in liquid film. 

The reaction that controls the mass transfer is 
$$ CO_2 + OH^- -> HCO_3^- $$ 
so maybe i have to use Daw / (k3 * por_l) instead of k1?
This gives a $Kga$ around 0.02, it is maybe stil too low? 


There is another problem in the R_tot formula
in the book the formula is (for the reaction part)
$$ \frac{H}{k * c_b * h_L} $$
but in the model we use Daw / (k3 * por_l)
This means we miss the concentration of OH in this case...
this needs to be corrected too. 

There is still one issue:

Rtot = 1 / (kg * ae) + Daw / (kl * ae * E) + Daw / (k3 * c_oh * por_l)

if c_oh = 0 we would get devision by zero?, what about doint 




## PDE for CO2 in liquid phase
### before
dm_co2 = advec_co2 + g2l + rxn_co2 * vol_liq 

### after 
dm_co2 = advec_co2 + g2l - rxn_co2 * vol_liq 

## Kga and Daw calculation: 
Before Daw was only calculated if Kga == 'Onda' now it is calcualted independently


# Equilibrium 


The equilibrium test for co2
```{python}
#| eval: false
#| echo: true
actual conc. [[  0.         651.46229675 651.46229675 651.46229675 651.46229675]
 [  0.         651.49070649 651.49070649 651.49070649 651.49070649]
 [  0.         651.49070856 651.49070856 651.49070856 651.49070856]
 [  0.         651.49070856 651.49070856 651.49070856 651.49070856]
 [  0.         651.49070856 651.49070856 651.49070856 651.49070856]
 [  0.         651.49070857 651.49070856 651.49070856 651.49070856]
 [  0.         651.4907086  651.49070854 651.49070856 651.49070856]
 [  0.         651.4907087  651.4907085  651.49070856 651.49070856]
 [  0.         651.49070897 651.49070838 651.49070856 651.49070856]
 [  0.         651.49070968 651.49070805 651.49070856 651.49070856]]

equilibrium con. [[  0.         651.49071685 651.49071685 651.49071685 651.49071685]
 [  0.         651.49070856 651.49070856 651.49070856 651.49070856]
 [  0.         651.49070856 651.49070856 651.49070856 651.49070856]
 [  0.         651.49070856 651.49070856 651.49070856 651.49070856]
 [  0.         651.49070856 651.49070856 651.49070856 651.49070856]
 [  0.         651.49070857 651.49070856 651.49070856 651.49070856]
 [  0.         651.4907086  651.49070854 651.49070856 651.49070856]
 [  0.         651.4907087  651.4907085  651.49070856 651.49070856]
 [  0.         651.49070897 651.49070838 651.49070856 651.49070856]
 [  0.         651.49070967 651.49070806 651.49070856 651.49070856]]

```
Since the equlibrium value is the same as the equlibrium value, 
what does this really mean.
This would mean something in the direction of that there is no mass transfer?


The equlibrium test that Sasha talked about for TOTC 
```{python}
#| eval: false
#| echo: true
c_h_profile  = 10**(-pH_profile) * 1000
c_h2co3_eq   = k1/k2 * ccl_co2t_eq
c_hco3_eq    = K_hco3 * 1000 * c_h2co3_eq /c_h_profile
c_co3_eq     = K_co3  * 1e6 * c_h2co3_eq/c_h_profile**2
TOTC_eq      = c_h2co3_eq + c_hco3_eq  + c_co3_eq

results
TOTC_liquid acutal = [[0.         1.03282048 1.03282048 1.03282048 1.03282048]
 [0.         1.03332971 1.03332971 1.03332971 1.03332971]
 [0.         1.03332996 1.03332996 1.03332996 1.03332996]
 [0.         1.03332996 1.03332996 1.03332996 1.03332996]
 [0.         1.03332996 1.03332996 1.03332996 1.03332996]
 [0.         1.03332996 1.03332996 1.03332996 1.03332996]
 [0.         1.03332996 1.03332996 1.03332996 1.03332996]
 [0.         1.03332996 1.03332996 1.03332996 1.03332996]
 [0.         1.03332996 1.03332996 1.03332996 1.03332996]
 [0.         1.03332996 1.03332996 1.03332996 1.03332996]]

TOTC_equilirbium [[0.         1.0485904  1.0485904  1.0485904  1.0485904 ]
 [0.         1.03306357 1.03306357 1.03306357 1.03306357]
 [0.         1.03305605 1.03305605 1.03305605 1.03305605]
 [0.         1.03305605 1.03305605 1.03305605 1.03305605]
 [0.         1.03305605 1.03305605 1.03305605 1.03305605]
 [0.         1.03305605 1.03305605 1.03305605 1.03305605]
 [0.         1.03305605 1.03305605 1.03305605 1.03305605]
 [0.         1.03305605 1.03305604 1.03305605 1.03305605]
 [0.         1.03305605 1.03305604 1.03305605 1.03305605]
 [0.         1.03305609 1.03305604 1.03305603 1.03305605]]
```

So this means that the problem is in the liquids capacity to absorp co2??
So the system reaches equilibrium very fast? no further absorption?
Improving Kga would not affect the mass transfer thats also what we say when Kga was set to 10 instead of 0.02. 



## Raise the pH from 11 to 13
```{python}
#| eval: false
#| echo: true

actual conc. [[  0.         132.26491879 132.264919   132.264919   132.264919  ]
 [  0.         125.64558941 125.64558398 125.64558398 125.64558398]
 [  0.         220.69753359 221.82370633 221.8305647  221.83060824]
 [  0.         287.95474549 295.62172362 295.75996018 295.76209742]
 [  0.         327.40139415 349.57500666 350.43048999 350.45410746]
 [  0.         347.73649416 389.97884122 392.97960321 393.11338806]
 [  0.         356.74268742 419.64664046 427.02415641 427.52520699]
 [  0.         360.11602533 440.32193292 454.48718461 455.88910741]
 [  0.         361.13163028 453.72198561 476.42117424 479.55768937]
 [  0.         361.28949166 461.70729295 493.48222585 499.36835218]]
equilibrium con. [[  0.         650.94331387 650.94331387 650.94331387 650.94331387]
 [  0.         650.87092822 650.87092822 650.87092822 650.87092822]
 [  0.         650.85145215 650.85158618 650.85158699 650.85158699]
 [  0.         650.83847208 650.83916131 650.83917191 650.83917207]
 [  0.         650.82809534 650.83002828 650.83008413 650.83008554]
 [  0.         650.81885261 650.82283171 650.82301804 650.82302526]
 [  0.         650.81007019 650.8168469  650.8173125  650.81733862]
 [  0.         650.80144859 650.81162099 650.81257231 650.81264579]
 [  0.         650.79286631 650.80685279 650.8085342  650.80870409]
 [  0.         650.78427969 650.8023456  650.80500555 650.80534882]]

 ==========================

TOTC_liquid acutal = [[ 0.         89.08203211 89.08203218 89.08203218 89.08203218]
 [ 0.         99.31558924 99.31558917 99.31558917 99.31558917]
 [ 0.         99.82329933 99.82424414 99.82424987 99.82424991]
 [ 0.         99.86985997 99.87367106 99.8737383  99.87373934]
 [ 0.         99.88789168 99.89641606 99.896727   99.89673559]
 [ 0.         99.89576489 99.90983389 99.91073326 99.91077358]
 [ 0.         99.89899916 99.91829025 99.92023424 99.92036683]
 [ 0.         99.90016902 99.92363146 99.92703578 99.92737136]
 [ 0.         99.90050006 99.92687738 99.93203469 99.93272129]
 [ 0.         99.90053215 99.92874363 99.93570158 99.93695602]]
TOTC_equilirbium [[    0.         23785.79730076 23785.79706476 23785.79706475
  23785.79706476]
 [    0.          1049.0804194   1049.0805223   1049.0805223
   1049.0805223 ]
 [    0.           279.97923045   278.61952693   278.61127757
    278.61122518]
 [    0.           214.02560658   208.74710397   208.6541658
    208.65272884]
 [    0.           189.26399987   177.77658437   177.36086129
    177.34937776]
 [    0.           178.64462008   160.04710783   158.87316328
    158.82075152]
 [    0.           174.32320297   149.13222941   146.65670036
    146.48832619]
 [    0.           172.76431313   142.36100289   138.10057663
    137.68301709]
 [    0.           172.32217763   138.29661368   131.9265203
    131.08680138]
 [    0.           172.27728595   135.9779365    127.46539987
    125.95331076]]
```

## increase the liquid velocity and decrease the gas velocity. 
```{python}
#| eval: false
#| echo: true

actual conc. [[  0.          46.4757479   46.4757479   46.4757479   46.4757479 ]
 [  0.          83.48963413  83.48963413  83.48963413  83.48963413]
 [  0.         103.30207864 103.30207864 103.30207864 103.30207864]
 [  0.         116.96666383 116.96666384 116.96666384 116.96666384]
 [  0.         126.38921893 126.38921898 126.38921898 126.38921898]
 [  0.         130.78832002 130.78832015 130.78832014 130.78832015]
 [  0.         130.52257817 130.52257866 130.52257863 130.52257864]
 [  0.         134.51851555 134.51852936 134.51852838 134.51852866]
 [  0.         147.00988087 147.0100469  147.01015822 147.01006373]
 [  0.         161.44794934 161.45022214 161.45667091 161.45041088]]
equilibrium con. [[  0.         582.34254841 582.34254841 582.34254841 582.34254841]
 [  0.         559.76580419 559.76580419 559.76580419 559.76580419]
 [  0.         547.20752196 547.20752196 547.20752196 547.20752196]
 [  0.         539.4251412  539.42514122 539.42514122 539.42514122]
 [  0.         534.47745438 534.47745447 534.47745446 534.47745447]
 [  0.         531.43721091 531.43721134 531.43721132 531.43721133]
 [  0.         529.76604152 529.76604323 529.76604314 529.76604318]
 [  0.         528.91019079 528.91019647 528.9101962  528.91019632]
 [  0.         528.35006368 528.35007922 528.35007692 528.35007851]
 [  0.         527.89208378 527.8920977  527.89200377 527.89209334]]

 ==========================

TOTC_liquid acutal = [[ 0.         56.83205235 56.83205235 56.83205235 56.83205235]
 [ 0.         74.86034416 74.86034416 74.86034416 74.86034416]
 [ 0.         84.90619933 84.90619933 84.90619933 84.90619933]
 [ 0.         91.10011554 91.10011554 91.10011554 91.10011554]
 [ 0.         95.02122222 95.02122223 95.02122223 95.02122223]
 [ 0.         97.46225781 97.46225783 97.46225783 97.46225783]
 [ 0.         98.86503484 98.86503488 98.86503488 98.86503488]
 [ 0.         99.48954327 99.48954323 99.48954324 99.48954324]
 [ 0.         99.67384896 99.67384802 99.6738466  99.67384781]
 [ 0.         99.72852771 99.72851357 99.72844029 99.7285104 ]]
TOTC_equilirbium [[0.00000000e+00 1.56797003e+06 1.56797003e+06 1.56797003e+06
  1.56797003e+06]
 [0.00000000e+00 9.76808823e+04 9.76808823e+04 9.76808823e+04
  9.76808823e+04]
 [0.00000000e+00 3.29692258e+04 3.29692258e+04 3.29692258e+04
  3.29692258e+04]
 [0.00000000e+00 1.48433293e+04 1.48433293e+04 1.48433293e+04
  1.48433293e+04]
 [0.00000000e+00 7.16478933e+03 7.16478932e+03 7.16478932e+03
  7.16478932e+03]
 [0.00000000e+00 3.35278699e+03 3.35278696e+03 3.35278696e+03
  3.35278696e+03]
 [0.00000000e+00 1.43225416e+03 1.43225411e+03 1.43225412e+03
  1.43225412e+03]
 [0.00000000e+00 6.34367509e+02 6.34367567e+02 6.34367556e+02
  6.34367557e+02]
 [0.00000000e+00 4.06474549e+02 4.06475704e+02 4.06477433e+02
  4.06475963e+02]
 [0.00000000e+00 3.39836390e+02 3.39853447e+02 3.39941776e+02
  3.39857275e+02]]
